args.Description: "Add useVideoTitle hook, and render video titles and thumbnails in active job cards and recent rows"
args.Instruction: "Define the useVideoTitle hook, integrate it into RecentClipRow to show clean video names, and update ClipJobCard to display the thumbnail and the video title next to the status icon."
args.toolAction: "Integrating dynamic video titles and job card thumbnails"
args.toolSummary: "Integrating dynamic video titles and job card thumbnails"
